enforcement_meta.source: FAT FDA seafood enforcement reporting package v2 (2026-06-17)
caveats: Events are public-record actions; absence of a record is not evidence of a clean facility.
Visible follow-up is the public record only, not internal FDA closeout. 45 of 54 warning-lettered firms show no visible public follow-up.
Import-refusal rows are entity-level summaries; OASIS (datadashboard.fda.gov) is the authoritative live refusal source.
Join to brands via normalized_entity / crosswalk.fda_bridge_entities; only P1 / existing_fda_bridge brands should surface FDA history in-app.

enforcement_events.note: Seafood HACCP violations.
